query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, COUNT(ac.id) as agent_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN agent_configs ac ON u.id = ac.user_id GROUP BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AZZAHwzL8CcpFVy.root --database Pbyi2wUKSGy94X9zGceg7e --execute SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, COUNT(ac.id) as agent_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN agent_configs ac ON u.id = ac.user_id GROUP BY u.id;
